description_long: This coffee machine features a robust, industrial design with a combination of brass and black metallic components mounted on a rectangular wooden base. The upper section includes a large cylindrical boiler flanked by two smaller vertical columns, all supported by four brass pillars. A prominent mechanical arm with geometric knobs and a spherical counterweight extends from one side, suggesting manual operation or pressure regulation. The lower section houses a cylindrical chamber with visible cutouts, likely for collecting brewed coffee or waste. The machine's surfaces are a mix of matte and glossy finishes, with exposed pipes and valves adding to its vintage, steampunk aesthetic. No visible branding or modern digital controls are present, emphasizing its mechanical and historical character.
description: A vintage, industrial-style coffee machine with brass and black metal components, mounted on a wooden base and featuring mechanical arms and cylindrical chambers. Its design is robust and steampunk-inspired, with exposed pipes and valves.
description_view_0: Side view showing the mechanical arm with geometric knobs and the spherical counterweight, as well as the main boiler and support pillars.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central boiler, two smaller columns, and the symmetrical arrangement of the support pillars.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mechanical arm from a different angle and the cylindrical chamber below the boiler.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the machine, the flat metal shield, and the spherical counterweight assembly.
